scripts.build:publish:packages: node ./scripts/build-package.mjs runtime core tooling postgres host deno node rest-collections otel auth blobs webhooks pact
scripts.ci:check: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run publish:dry-run
scripts.publish:dry-run: bun run build:publish:packages && (cd packages/runtime && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/core && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/tooling && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/postgres && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/host && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/deno && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/node && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/rest-collections && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/otel && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/auth && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/blobs && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/webhooks && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/pact && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/bun && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile)
scripts.release:publish: bun run build:publish:packages && (cd packages/runtime && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/core && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/tooling && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/postgres && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/host && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/deno && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/node && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/rest-collections && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/otel && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/auth && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/blobs && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/webhooks && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/pact && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/bun && bun publish --frozen-lockfile)
scripts.docs:deploy: vitepress build docs && wrangler pages deploy docs/.vitepress/dist --project-name chimpbase-docs
